name: @ideate/artifact-server
description: MCP server that serves ideate artifact content on demand

scripts.pretest: node --input-type=module -e "import { statSync } from 'fs'; try { const ts=statSync('../../scripts/migrate-to-v3.ts').mtimeMs; let js; try { js=statSync('../../scripts/migrate-to-v3.js').mtimeMs; } catch(e) { if(e.code==='ENOENT'){process.stderr.write('WARNING: migrate-to-v3.js not found — run: cd mcp/artifact-server && npm run build:migration\n');process.exit(1);} throw e; } if(js<ts){process.stderr.write('WARNING: migrate-to-v3.js may be stale — run: cd mcp/artifact-server && npm run build:migration\n');process.exit(1);} } catch(e) {}"
